# juju_secret (List Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
list "juju_secret" "this" {
  provider         = juju
  include_resource = true

  config {
    model_uuid = "<model-uuid>"

    # Optional: filter by secret name
    # name = "my-secret"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `model_uuid` (String) The Juju model UUID.

### Optional

- `name` (String) Filter by secret name.
